name: Green Bean Salad with Mint
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Place walnuts on a cookie sheet or in a shallow pan and broil in the oven until browned and aromatic, 5 to 10 minutes, stirring and turning once or twice.
Wash the green beans and trim their ends. Cut into thirds. Parboil by dropping into boiling water for 5 minutes. Drain and plunge into ice water for 5 minutes; drain and chill.
Combine oil, mint leaves, vinegar, salt, garlic, and pepper in a food processor or blender and process for 20 seconds. Set aside.
Place the beans in a large glass bowl and top with toasted walnuts, red onion, and feta. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss. Best if made 2 hours ahead of time or the day before to develop flavors.
